evals.prompt: Implement a shared counter that increments for all users when any one user clicks a button.
evals.expected_output: A script using RealtimeStore or Sync Kit to manage a shared integer.
expectations: Uses ConnectedLensesModule to check session state
Uses RealtimeStore to host a shared value (e.g., 'counter')
Calls store.set() or increments via a server-side logic pattern
Includes a listener to update local UI when the store value changes

evals.prompt: Write a script that broadcasts a 'Sparkle' network event to all users when a user taps a SceneObject.
evals.expected_output: A script using session.sendMessage to broadcast a custom event.
expectations: Message payload includes the event name 'Sparkle'
Includes session.onMessageReceived.add(callback) to handle the effect locally
Checks if the local user is in a session before sending
